overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character ascending from an underground stairwell into a neon-lit covered market with various food stalls and vendors, then entering an elevator with multiple news screens displaying broadcasts.

events.description: ascends stairs and enters covered market area from underground

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs from underground level toward market entrance

notable_agents.action: person sitting on stairs to the left side

entered.detail: purple and pink gang tag spray-painted on concrete wall
wide concrete stairs with metal handrails ascending
overhead fluorescent lighting tubes along ceiling
archway entrance with illuminated Japanese text signage

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in an underground stairwell with concrete walls and fluorescent lighting. Purple 'Tyger Claws' gang graffiti is visible on the right wall as the character ascends the stairs toward a lit archway marking the market entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underground market with food vendors

events.description: passes under archway and enters covered market area from stairwell
slight turn to right while navigating between market stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through covered market past various food stalls and vendors

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind food service counter
person in red jacket standing at ramen stall

entered.detail: food stall with glass display case and neon lighting
food stall with striped awning and hanging red lantern
industrial ceiling with exposed ducts and ventilation pipes

segments.scene_description: Entering the covered market from the stairwell, the space opens into a neon-lit corridor with food stalls. A vendor stands behind a counter on the right while a person in red waits at a ramen stall on the left. The ceiling shows exposed industrial piping and fluorescent lights mixed with colorful neon signage.

events.description: turns left while walking toward elevator entrance area
approaches elevator entrance with metal mesh security gate

agents.ego_description: navigating through market toward elevator entrance

notable_agents.action: person in yellow shirt standing near elevator entrance
vendor at food counter wearing white shirt

entered.detail: elevator lobby with metal frame and illuminated interior
security gate with metal mesh covering elevator entrance
illuminated vending machine with beverage display
metal roll-up security doors with mesh windows

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the market, the camera turns left toward an elevator entrance visible in the distance. The area features industrial roll-up doors on the left and a vending machine on the right. A person in a yellow shirt stands near the elevator as the character approaches the metal mesh gate.

events.description: enters elevator through metal mesh gate
elevator begins ascending as floor indicator changes from 01 to 02

agents.ego_description: entering elevator and turning to face the video screens and control panel

entered.detail: wooden paneled walls with bronze trim inside elevator cabin
four video screens displaying news broadcast with female anchor
vertical control panel with illuminated floor buttons and display

segments.scene_description: The character enters the elevator cabin, leaving the market behind. Inside, four video screens display a news broadcast with a blonde anchor. The wooden-paneled walls and carpeted floor contrast with the industrial exterior. The elevator control panel illuminates as the cabin begins ascending from floor 01 to floor 02.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person ascent from a gritty underground stairwell into a vibrant neon market and finally into a polished elevator cabin. It begins by climbing concrete stairs under fluorescent lights, passing purple Tyger Claws graffiti on the right before emerging through a lit archway. As the camera enters the covered market, the space expands into a neon-lit corridor filled with industrial piping, food stalls, and vendors. The movement then shifts left, passing industrial roll-up doors and a vending machine toward a metal mesh elevator gate where a person in a yellow shirt stands. Finally, the scene transitions from the industrial bustle into the enclosed elevator, where wooden panels and carpeted floors surround four screens broadcasting a news anchor as the cabin ascends from the first to the second floor.
